task_text: Slice-1 implementation plan (PR #449 review fixes): typed BriefResult status (only disabled may fall back; invalid blocks); typed offer_groups structural enforcement (combos cannot collapse); scope the free-text locked-value scan to identity/commercial facts (allow occasion/theme art direction); plan-doc correction that required facts derive from locked facts only (never model-authored request_intent). Dormant/flag-gated.
